public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as market broker.
manner: Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a market broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of market broker in and around Duneshade Outpost, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Duneshade Outpost workable through the obligations of market broker while managing the immediate pressure of water scarcity in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must balance relationship value against immediate margin without losing either entirely. Around Duneshade Outpost, that usually means carrying water scarcity, subterranean predators, convoy delay without letting the role of market broker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Tovek Coalward needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Duneshade Outpost before trust collapses.
Tovek Coalward can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Tovek Coalward read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation. In Duneshade Outpost, this lands inside a public field already shaped by route captains, rationing families.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Duneshade Outpost: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
